COIN.title: A Little-Known Crypto Trade Is Suddenly Pulling In ETF Money After Coinbase Move

F.title: Al Rally Hits Rate-Hike Wall As Inflation Spikes: This Week On Wall Street

beneficiaries.rationale: Charles Schwab carries large held-to-maturity duration losses and benefits directly from any steepening / front-end relief. Leadership change perceived as more market-friendly to financials drives multiple expansion in rate-sensitive brokers.
Largest US bank — direct beneficiary if Warsh chairmanship signals lighter Basel III Endgame implementation and softer capital requirements, which Warsh has publicly criticized.

macro_events.event_summary: The Federal Reserve announced Jerome Powell will serve as chair pro tempore until Kevin Warsh is sworn in as the new Fed chair, confirming a leadership transition at the central bank.
primary_drivers: Perceived shift toward a more dovish / politically accommodative Fed under Warsh (curve steepening, weaker dollar)
Fed independence / credibility risk premium (gold, crypto, long-end term premium)
Expectation of lighter bank regulation under Warsh, who has publicly criticized post-GFC capital rules
headlines: Federal Reserve Board names Jerome H. Powell as chair pro tempore; Powell will serve as chair pro tempore until Kevin M. Warsh is sworn in as the new chair
